name: arc-running-network
description: ARC — Members' Running Network. Closed members' running network: race calendar, Who's Going, hub meetups. By invitation only.

scripts.build: npm run sync && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:android:release: npm run build && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.build:android:debug: npm run build && cd android && ./gradlew bundleDebug
